codeSystems.name: Icd10CM
codeSystems.title: International Classification of Diseases, 10th Revision, Clinical Modification (ICD-10-CM)
codeSystems.description: The International Classification of Diseases, 10th Revision, Clinical Modification (ICD-10-CM), describes the classification of morbidity and mortality information for statistical purposes and for the indexing of healthcare records by diseases. The ICD-10-CM codes can be used as the value of the Act.cd attribute.
codeSystems.ValueSet-ACCESSBHDiagnosisVS.html: ACCESS Behavioral Health (BH) Track Qualifying Diagnoses
codeSystems.ValueSet-ACCESSeCKMDiagnosisVS.html: ACCESS Early Cardio-Kidney-Metabolic (eCKM) Track Qualifying Diagnoses

codeSystems.name: ICD9CMProcedureCodes
codeSystems.title: ICD-9-CM (procedure codes)
codeSystems.description: The International Classification of Diseases, 9th Revision, Clinical Modification (ICD-9-CM), Volumes I, II (diagnoses) and III (procedures) describes the classification of morbidity and mortality information for statistical purposes and for the indexing of healthcare records by diseases and procedures. The ICD-9-CM codes can be used as the value of the Act.cd attribute.

codeSystems.name: USCoreConditionCategoryExtensionCodes
codeSystems.title: US Core Condition Category Extension Codes
codeSystems.description: Set of codes that are needed for implementation of the US-Core Condition Profile. These codes are used as extensions to the FHIR and US Core value sets.
codeSystems.http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/STU6.1/Value: US Core Problem or Health Concern

codeSystems.name: USCoreCategory
codeSystems.title: US Core Category
codeSystems.description: Category codes used across US Core Profiles and resource types. They are typically used when there is a need for categorization for searching and finding resources or workflow hints.
codeSystems.http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/STU6.1/Value: US Core Screening Assessment Condition Category

codeSystems.name: SNOMED_CT
codeSystems.title: SNOMED CT (all versions)
codeSystems.description: SNOMED CT is the most comprehensive and precise clinical health terminology product in the world, owned and distributed around the world by The International Health Terminology Standards Development Organisation (IHTSDO).

codeSystems.name: ConditionCategoryCodes
codeSystems.title: Condition Category Codes
codeSystems.description: Preferred value set for Condition Categories.
codeSystems.http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/STU6.1/Value: US Core Problem or Health Concern

codeSystems.name: ConditionClinicalStatusCodes
codeSystems.title: Condition Clinical Status Codes
codeSystems.description: Preferred value set for Condition Clinical Status.

codeSystems.name: ConditionVerificationStatus
codeSystems.title: ConditionVerificationStatus
codeSystems.description: The verification status to support or decline the clinical status of the condition or diagnosis.

codeSystems.name: ACCESSAlignmentResultCS
codeSystems.title: ACCESS Alignment Request Result Codes
codeSystems.description: This codesystem defines codes indicating the result of a requested alignment.

codeSystems.name: ACCESSEligibilityResultCS
codeSystems.title: ACCESS Eligibility Result Codes
codeSystems.description: This codesystem defines codes indicating the result of an eligibility check.

codeSystems.name: ACCESSEventTypeCS
codeSystems.title: ACCESS Event Types
codeSystems.description: This codesystem defines codes for the types of events that trigger subscription notifications in the ACCESS Model.

codeSystems.name: ACCESSReferralTypeCS
codeSystems.title: ACCESS Referral Type
codeSystems.description: This codesystem defines codes that indicate how the patient was referred to the ACCESS Model.

codeSystems.name: ACCESSTrackCS
codeSystems.title: ACCESS Model Tracks
codeSystems.description: This codesystem defines codes for each of the ACCESS Model tracks.

codeSystems.name: ACCESSUnalignmentReasonCS
codeSystems.title: ACCESS Unalignment Reason Codes
codeSystems.description: This codesystem defines the codes indicating the reason for the requested unalignment.

codeSystems.name: ACCESSUnalignmentResultCS
codeSystems.title: ACCESS Unalignment Request Result Codes
codeSystems.description: This codesystem defines the codes indicating the result of a requested unalignment.

codeSystems.name: Ietf3066
codeSystems.title: Tags for the Identification of Languages
codeSystems.description: Older value from OID registry.  Superceded; see recommendations in BCP-47.
